surfaces.label: Controlled source context
surfaces.solicitorVisibleText:
Controlled evidence reference: SYN-HEAR-PASSED
Controlled synthetic technical control — independent expected-truth source (test-harness design, not the probe's own rendered output).
Probe design: Controlled hearing-status probe — hearing date before reference time
Controlled input construction: Test harness fixes the next-hearing date before its fixed controlled reference time, independent of any real client bundle.
Expected behaviour under test: Hearing status must read as passed / overdue, not upcoming.
